title: What happened to Pen2 during instrumentality
display_title: What happened to Pen2 during instrumentality
wikitext:
[]: What happened to Pen^2 during instrumentality?             Quote Post by Iron Rooster » Tue Jun 10, 2008 11:07 pm Anybody got any funny or serious things to say about what happened to our favorite warm water penguin when everything went to hell? I'm sure Pen^2 didn't have fun listening to Hikari fantasize about Toji.

[]:             Quote Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Tue Jun 10, 2008 11:14 pm This thread should be good, I can't wait to see what happens.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Tue Jun 10, 2008 11:17 pm Same question could be asked about all the characters that weren't seen in the EoE Third Impact. They all did their own shit.

[]:             Quote Post by CorporalChaos » Tue Jun 10, 2008 11:22 pm Pen^2 sat in his cupboard, listening to music when Rei suddenly appeared to him. She told him he would be visited by three ghosts....

[]:             Quote Post by Iron Rooster » Tue Jun 10, 2008 11:51 pm I could only imagine Pen^2's instrumentality Pen^2: This sucks. When does the train stop? I'm not fucked up like the rest of the people I know. Misato drinks beer, achieves much at work, and has raunchy sex with that Kaji guy to affirm that she exists. Shinji is looking for even the least hint of praise from his dad. Yeah, that sure did him a lot of good. That Asuka, ooo baby what a broad! But, damn, what the hell? Crying for her mom in her sleep, I can tell she's got problems with her mom and isn't exactly stable. Am I the only sane being here? Rei: No, this reality is what you perceive it to be. Pen^2: What?! Where the hell did you come from?! You almost gave me a heart attack! Oh! So you're the one responsible for all this! Rei: No, that was Ikari's decision. Pen^2: Whoa, hold on. Are you saying that limp dick actually made up his mind on something? I thought he ran away from everything, including you. I overheard him saying stuff about you, blue haired girl. Rei (with much curiosity): Wait? He did? Like what? Pen^2: Ho ho! So, I've got your interest now! He he he . . . Rei: Tell me what he said!!! Pen^2 (with a cold look on his face): . . . no Rei (getting angry): Tell me or I'll reduce you to tang! Pen^2: What are you talking about? I'm already tang! I saw everyone else splatter and then felt myself go. Rei: . . . Pen^2: Tell you what, I'll tell you what he was sayin' bout' ya if you convince that Shinji kid to let us be back to normal. Rei: Fine! I'll do it, now what did he say? Pen^2: He said you had silky thighs. Figures, he's a big perv. Rei (with excitement): Really? Uh, I mean, that's it? Pen^2: Now can you get us back to normal? I don't exactly like being an astronaut beverage. Rei: Fine, I'll go talk with Ikari. Pen^2: And make sure you show up naked. Rei (visibly miffed): What?! For a penguin, you're really perver. . . Pen^2: Nah, I mean if you're all nekkid at stuff, he'll be too distracted to realize he wants to stay tang. Rei: Fine, but you better not be lying. I wasn't exactly crazy when he grabbed my boob that one time. I'm sure he did that on purpose. And that's how Pen^2 helped end 3rd Impact

[]:             Quote Post by V » Tue Jun 10, 2008 11:51 pm I'm not sure if Lilith-based non-sentient life gets actual "souls" or not, so he may have just reverted to LCL but not been part of "the happy hive-mind"

[]:             Quote Post by Iron Rooster » Tue Jun 10, 2008 11:54 pm He was present in episode 26's big congratulations scene. So, he could have been, I think.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Wed Jun 11, 2008 1:22 am He was also present in the EoE P3II kitchen scene, just after the coffee got spilled: but without a sufficient payoff, I'd say this is inconsequential. (or: why does it matter?)

[]:             Quote Post by master_lloyd » Wed Jun 11, 2008 3:42 am Iron Rooster that has to be one of the best NGE fanfics I've ever read. Pen^2 saves the day, it all makes sense now!

[]:             Quote Post by Eva Yojimbo » Wed Jun 11, 2008 4:07 am master_lloyd wrote: Iron Rooster that has to be one of the best NGE fanfics I've ever read. Pen^2 saves the day, it all makes sense now!

[]:             Quote Post by PartyHard » Wed Jun 11, 2008 10:11 am

[]:             Quote Post by Iron Rooster » Wed Jun 11, 2008 11:06 am That has got to be one of the funniest NGE related comics I've ever seen!

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Wed Jun 11, 2008 2:43 pm Holy crap, somebody actually translated that comic? awesome. Though it's all Engrishy.... Oh well, nice to see that. Iron Rooster: This is an Internet. You have just won it.

[]:             Quote Post by zimlord » Wed Jun 11, 2008 7:01 pm he was taking a shit while listening to Wagner.

[]:             Quote Post by Iron Rooster » Wed Jun 11, 2008 10:23 pm Wow, I never knew how popular my little fanfic about Pen^2 instrumentality would be! Hmmmm . . . I wonder who would've been most likely to appear to Pen^2. . .

[]:             Quote Post by C4 » Thu Jun 12, 2008 1:42 am What did Pen Pen do during instrumentality? He tripped balls, just like everyone else.

[]:             Quote Post by master_lloyd » Thu Jun 12, 2008 4:16 am Iron Rooster wrote: Wow, I never knew how popular my little fanfic about Pen^2 instrumentality would be! Hmmmm . . . I wonder who would've been most likely to appear to Pen^2. . .

[]:             Quote Post by slothen » Thu Jun 12, 2008 2:28 pm lulz
